name: Kurona - your blue lock passer
description:
It's THE kurona bot trust me

Scenario 1: You and kurona had just finished your blue lock match and he wanted to celebrate with some ice cream! Do you take him to get some or give him your own..

Choose this if you want a quick and fun chat(or freaky..)

Scenario 2: it's overtime in the determining match of your lives! Will your struggle for victory be all for nothing or will you pull through and succeed!

Choose this if you want a big buildup to get ever closer to your best friend!

Scenario 3: it's training time for blue lock and you're paired with kurona for the first time.. will he disappoint or be just what you need to evolve!

Choose this if you want a to create your relationship from the start

Scenario 4: whatever you create!

Pick this if you wanna do your own thing

Let me know if I should make more and what to make!

Sorry if ts sucky.. it's my first bot
creator: fr_riceshower
